appToParent.when: Sent immediately after the embed app mounts and URL verification succeeds.
appToParent.description: Signals that the embed is ready to receive messages. The parent should send pqc:auth (if using an auth token) after receiving this.

appToParent.when: Sent after pqc:ready when persistMode is "postMessage". The parent must respond with pqc:loadResponse.
appToParent.description: Requests the previously saved user snapshot. The parent should reply with pqc:loadResponse containing the stored snapshot (or null for a new user). The app waits up to 2 seconds for the response before proceeding with an empty state.

fields.name: userId
fields.description: The anonymized user identifier from the signed URL (uid parameter). Use this as the key to look up the stored snapshot in your own database or localStorage.

appToParent.when: Sent whenever the user makes progress: completing a module step, submitting a quiz, completing an assessment, or changing persona.
appToParent.description: Delivers the full user journey snapshot to the parent for storage. The vendor is responsible for persisting this — in localStorage, a database, or any backend. The snapshot is opaque JSON and should be returned verbatim in pqc:loadResponse on the next session.

fields.name: snapshot
fields.description: The complete user journey state. Contents: completed module IDs, quiz scores, assessment answers, active persona, active region/industry, viewed milestones, generated artifacts. Treat as opaque — return it verbatim in pqc:loadResponse.

appToParent.when: Sent after each significant user action for activity tracking and analytics.
appToParent.description: Delivers one or more user activity events to the parent. Use these for progress tracking dashboards, compliance reporting, or metering. Each event includes a timestamp and the userId.

fields.name: events
fields.description: Array of activity events. Each event has: type (e.g. "module_completed", "quiz_session", "step_completed", "assessment_completed"), moduleId (if applicable), data (event-specific payload), timestamp (ISO 8601).

appToParent.when: Sent when the embed content height changes (debounced 100ms).
appToParent.description: Used for iframe auto-height. Set the iframe height to the reported value to avoid double scrollbars. Example: iframe.style.height = height + "px".

appToParent.when: Sent when a vendor API call returns 401/403 (auth token has expired). Only relevant when using custom auth tokens.
appToParent.description: Signals that the current auth token is no longer valid. The parent should generate a new token and send it via pqc:auth. Until the new token arrives, API calls are queued.

parentToApp.when: Sent by the parent after receiving pqc:ready, and again after pqc:authExpired.
parentToApp.description: Delivers an opaque auth token to the embed. The token is stored in memory only (never persisted). Use this to pass a short-lived JWT or session token without exposing it in the URL.

fields.name: token
fields.description: Opaque auth token string. Stored in React ref — never written to localStorage, URL, or cookies.

parentToApp.when: Sent in response to pqc:load. Must be sent within 2 seconds or the app proceeds with empty state.
parentToApp.description: Returns the previously saved snapshot for the user. If no snapshot exists (new user or first visit), send null — the app will start fresh. The snapshot is applied before the first render.

fields.name: snapshot
fields.description: The snapshot previously received in pqc:save, or null for a new user.

urlParams.name: kid
urlParams.description: Key identifier — maps to the vendor certificate filename stem in the PQC Today vendor registry.

urlParams.name: uid
urlParams.description: Anonymized user identifier. Opaque to PQC Today — vendor is responsible for mapping to real identity. Used as the key in all postMessage persistence and event messages.

urlParams.name: exp
urlParams.description: URL expiry as Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). PQC Today tolerates up to 5 minutes of clock skew. The effective session duration is min(exp − now, cert.maxDuration).

urlParams.name: nonce
urlParams.description: Random hex string for replay mitigation. Minimum 16 characters. Generate fresh per URL.

urlParams.name: routes
urlParams.description: Comma-separated route preset names (e.g. "learn,assess") or explicit paths. Must be a subset of what the vendor certificate authorizes.

urlParams.name: persist
urlParams.description: Persistence mode. "postMessage" = save/load via parent window messages. "none" = stateless session.

urlParams.name: theme
urlParams.description: Force color mode and hide the toggle. If omitted, uses the VendorTheme.colorMode cert value or the user's system preference.

urlParams.name: persona
urlParams.description: Sets the initial user persona (e.g. "curious", "basics", "expert"). Clamped to cert-allowed personas. If the cert allows only one persona, it is auto-applied.

urlParams.name: ind
urlParams.description: Industry pre-filter (e.g. "finance", "healthcare"). Applied after verification — not included in the ECDSA canonical string. Seeds the industry context shown in compliance and assessment pages.

urlParams.name: assistant
urlParams.description: Override the cert's assistantEnabled value for this session. "false" hides the PQC AI assistant even if the cert enables it.

urlParams.name: sig
urlParams.description: Base64url-encoded ECDSA P-256 signature (raw r||s, 64 bytes). Covers all parameters except sig itself, sorted alphabetically by key and joined as key=value&key=value (values not URL-encoded).

errorCodes.description: One or more required URL parameters are absent (kid, uid, exp, nonce, routes, persist, sig).
The kid parameter does not match any entry in the vendor registry.
The vendor certificate has been revoked (revoked: true in the registry).
The certificate's notBefore date is in the future.
The certificate's notAfter date has passed.
The exp timestamp has passed (plus 5-minute clock skew tolerance).
The URL expiry would grant a session longer than cert.session.maxDuration allows.
The routes parameter requests a preset or path not authorized by the vendor certificate.
The current path navigates to a module not in the cert's routes.modules allowlist.
The current path navigates to a tool not in the cert's routes.tools allowlist.
The persist mode is not in the cert's session.persistModes allowlist.
ECDSA P-256 signature verification failed. Likely cause: wrong key, wrong canonical string, or URL was modified after signing.
An unexpected error occurred during verification (e.g., cert parse failure, WebCrypto unavailable).

vendorTheme.description: Brand primary color. Used for buttons, active nav items, links, and focus rings.
Text color on primary-colored backgrounds (e.g. button label).
Secondary brand color for secondary action buttons and some badges.
Text color on secondary-colored backgrounds.
Page background color.
Card and panel background color (also applied to dropdowns and modals).
Main body text color.
Muted section background — table headers, zebra rows, secondary panels.
Muted text color — table header labels, metadata, placeholders.
Border and input outline color.
Accent color for hover states and secondary highlights.
Override link/anchor color. Defaults to primary.
Override success status color (badges, indicators).
Override warning status color.
Override destructive/error status color.
Page background color used when colorMode is "dark". Overrides the default dark background. Pair with darkCard, darkForeground, darkBorder for a complete dark theme.
Card and panel background color in dark mode.
Main body text color in dark mode.
Muted section background in dark mode (table headers, zebra rows).
Muted text color in dark mode.
Border and input outline color in dark mode.
Base border-radius applied to all rounded elements (cards, buttons, badges, inputs). Cascades to sm/md/lg/xl variants.
Font family stack for all text in the embed.
Table row and filter dropdown item vertical padding. compact=6px, normal=12px, relaxed=16px.
Default color mode for this embed. URL ?theme= takes priority if also set. User can still toggle after load.
Navigation structure. "top" = horizontal header (default). "sidebar" = fixed left panel.
Sidebar width. Use "56px" for icon-only or "200px" for icon+label. Only applies when navLayout is "sidebar".
Nav bar height override.
Background color of the active navigation item. Overrides the default primary/10 tint.
Navigation bar background color. When set, the nav header uses this color instead of the page background.
Text and icon color in the navigation bar. Defaults to #FFFFFF when sidebar is set.
Replace "PQC Today" in the nav header with your brand name. If omitted, shows "PQC Today" with default gradient style.
URL to a vendor logo image shown in the nav header (replaces text wordmark). Must be HTTPS, hosted on your origin. Recommended: ≤ 120×32px.
Logo image height override.
Logo image max-width override.
"solid" renders status badges (Online, Active, Critical) with full-opacity background. "tinted" (default) uses a subtle /10 opacity tint.

routes.description: Section-level route presets that this vendor is authorized to embed. "all" grants full app access.
If set, restricts /learn/* to only these module IDs. Undefined = all modules within the licensed preset.
If set, restricts /playground/* and /business/tools/* to only these tool IDs. Undefined = all tools in preset.

content.description: Geographic regions the vendor's users may select. Scopes compliance content and migration guidance.
Industry verticals available to users. Affects assessment defaults, compliance frameworks shown, and threat relevance.
Learning persona roles available. Single role → auto-applied (no picker shown).
Difficulty ceiling. Modules above this level are blocked at navigation time.
Persona IDs allowed (e.g. ["executive", "developer"]). Undefined = all standard personas permitted.

session.description: Maximum session duration in seconds. The effective session is min(exp − now, maxDuration). Typical values: 3600 (1h), 28800 (8h), 86400 (24h).
Persistence modes the vendor is authorized to use. The URL persist= parameter must be a member of this list.

features.description: Whether the PQC AI assistant FAB and panel are shown. Can be further suppressed per-session via URL ?assistant=false.
true = suppress the entire navigation header. Use for full-page iframe embeds where you supply your own navigation.
true = hide the About route from the navigation and block direct access.
true = hide the "Powered by PQC Today" attribution badge. Requires explicit agreement with PQC Today.
true = show a (?) help icon in the top-right nav area linking to helpUrl.
URL the help button links to. Required when showHelpButton is true.
Custom heading shown at the top of the PQC Assistant drawer. Defaults to "PQC Assistant".
Max-width of the assistant panel. Defaults to "400px".
